title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Carrier India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Carrier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
